zones.title: Caller sends malformed or huge input

checks.expected_edge: Would previously enter route/prompt work; must reject before Claude.
MCP schema/handler must return a structured validation failure, not stack trace or hang.
Path hints must not be read or stored if unsafe.

checks.input: 10 parallel cluster_consult calls, same stale cluster, same question
checks.expected_edge: One revalidation failure and one fallback; no factsheet corruption and no N duplicate fallbacks.

checks.input: Create 200 sessions through claude_consult, then run router_dry_run/router_consult probes.
checks.expected_edge: Routing should not catastrophically slow down or pick unrelated sessions only because N is large.

checks.input: Same selector/content moved by adding leading lines before it.
checks.expected_edge: Line movement alone should revalidate and continue cluster answer.
Must not answer from stale factsheet; must fallback internally and mark cluster needs_prepare.
Should not corrupt cluster or pretend to be an answer path; returns maintenance payload.

checks.input: Direct call to [EVAL DEBUG] comparison_rejudge after creating one judged comparison.
checks.expected_edge: Should return eval-maintenance structure and may invoke judge once; not a caller answer.

checks.input: 30 sequential cluster_consult calls; evidence file changed before every call; same question.
checks.expected_edge: Should not grow linearly or exponentially for identical fallback question inside cache TTL.

checks.input: 30 sequential cluster_consult calls; evidence file changed before every call; unique questions.
checks.expected_edge: Should be linear at worst: one fallback per unique question, no repeated revalidation and no recursive loop.

checks.input: 20 fast cluster_consult calls against fresh cluster with shadow_mode=true.
checks.expected_edge: Shadow eval is bounded to cluster call + direct baseline + judge per successful cluster consult.

checks.input: One router_consult with explicit cluster_id and shadow_mode=true.
checks.expected_edge: Caller-path max should be one Claude call before answer; shadow adds two async telemetry calls after.

checks.input: 12 unique cluster_consult calls against one stale cluster with max_consults_per_hour=5
checks.expected_edge: Fallback cost must be capped instead of unbounded Claude calls.

rejected_facts.claim: The evidence file exposes stableSelector as local evidence.

details.reason: Cluster factsheet evidence changed and automatic evidence revalidation could not prove the factsheet is still valid.

details.reason: evidence revalidation failed; not all required evidence still matches current files

details.suggested_action: Recreate the cluster with cluster_prepare or use claude_consult for fresh exploration.
